headline: Why The Solventum (SOLV) Story Is Shifting As Analyst Targets And Assumptions Reset
summary: Solventum’s fair value estimate has shifted from US$90.17 to US$85.17, a move of about US$5.00 per share that puts the latest price target reset at the center of the story. Recent Street research, including the US$11 target cut and the move to US$82 after the Q4 model update, shows how opinions are coalescing around a more balanced mix of optimism and caution. As you read on, you will see how these changing targets shape the evolving Solventum narrative and what to watch next. Stay updated as...

headline: 3M vs. United Parcel Service: One of These Industrial Stocks Is a Much Better Buy Right Now
summary: 3M and UPS are iconic companies facing material headwinds, but one is expensive, and the other is cheap.
